title: Check if Array Is Sorted and Rotated
titleCn: 检查数组是否经排序和轮转得到

testcases.input: nums = [3,4,5,1,2] Output: true Explanation: [1,2,3,4,5] is the original sorted array. You can rotate the array by x = 2 positions to begin on the element of value 3: [3,4,5,1,2].
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: [1,2,3,4,5] is the original sorted array. You can rotate the array by x = 2 positions to begin on the element of value 3: [3,4,5,1,2].

testcases.input: nums = [2,1,3,4] Output: false Explanation: There is no sorted array once rotated that can make nums.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: There is no sorted array once rotated that can make nums.

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3] Output: true Explanation: [1,2,3] is the original sorted array. You can rotate the array by x = 0 positions (i.e. no rotation) to make nums.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: [1,2,3] is the original sorted array. You can rotate the array by x = 0 positions (i.e. no rotation) to make nums.
